board.emptyDescription: Add local Git repositories to view their status and commit from one window.
board.missingDescription: This project may have been removed.

card.replaceTargets: Replace the current run targets with new suggestions?
card.removeDescription: This only removes the project from GitTracker. Files and Git history will not be deleted.
card.htmlOpened: Opened HTML with the system app

docs.startDescription: Initialize Goal and Task folders plus an editable goal.md inside DOCS.
docs.goalReady: A goal document was found. Open it to refine the project goal, then generate actionable tasks.
docs.goalEmpty: The goal has not been written yet. Edit goal.md first.
docs.noTasks: No tasks · Generate them from the right panel
docs.libraryDescription: Read a folder inside the project (DOCS by default) and show all files hierarchically.
docs.chooseTitle: Choose a document library inside the project
docs.confirmDescription: Set “{{root}}” as the project document library. Files can live in any project folder; after confirming, documents from that folder will be listed.
docs.folderRequired: Enter a document library folder inside the project
docs.folderOutside: Choose a folder inside the current project
docs.subtitle: Project document library · Folder hierarchy
docs.deleteFileDescription: This file will be permanently deleted and cannot be undone.
docs.deleteFolderDescription: This folder and every file inside it will be permanently deleted and cannot be undone.
docs.htmlOpened: HTML opened in the default browser

changesDialog.title: Changes · {{name}}
changesDialog.description: All changed files in the current worktree.

changedFileDialog.description: Read-only view of this file's changes.
changedFileDialog.deletedCannotEdit: This file was deleted and cannot be edited.

commit.title: Commit · {{name}}
commit.description: Review and commit the current worktree changes.
commit.help: GitTracker manages the staging snapshot internally. AI generation reads all changes without modifying them.
commit.pushHelp: Push to the current tracked branch using the system Git credentials

discard.title: Discard all changes in {{name}}?
discard.description: Tracked changes will be restored. A recovery patch is created when possible.
discard.confirmRequired: Enter DISCARD to confirm this destructive operation
discard.patchMissing: No recovery patch was created; the changes were still discarded.
discard.warning: This discards local changes in the selected files and normally cannot be undone.
discard.help: GitTracker attempts to create a Recovery Patch first.
discard.untrackedHelp: Off by default: untracked files are preserved.

editor.description: Edit the Markdown document and save it to the project.

daily.title: Daily completion
daily.description: Summarize work from commit messages across all projects.
daily.empty: Generated summaries appear here and stay available.
daily.weekAction: What did I do this week?
daily.sevenDaysAction: What did I do in the past 7 days?
daily.autoDescription: Summarize commit messages from configured projects into a shareable, project-grouped work summary.
daily.timeHint: While the app stays open, today’s summary is generated at this time each day (from 00:00 to the trigger moment), same format as manual. Defaults to 00:00.
daily.imageDialogDescription: Preview the image, then save it in one click.
daily.imageFooter: Generated by GitTracker from commit history
daily.historyDescription: Every generated summary is kept below, grouped by project.
